message:
refactor(random): simplify RNG state parsing with let-chains

Replace nested if-else with starts_with/parse chains using Rust
let-chains (if-let with && guards) in Mt19937Rng state deserialization
and BitGeneratorState validation. This flattens deeply nested
conditional blocks into concise, readable pattern matches without
changing any behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
